case_title: KDF POST STREET LP VS. LUZ AL-DIJALI et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KDF POST STREET LP AS TO DEFENDANT AL-DIJAILI, LUZ DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
